home.eyebrow: 3 free tests + Complete Profile free in pilot
home.leadPrefix: Discover what fits you, without the stress. Quick quizzes + real ideas:

tests.label: Real scenarios
tests.description: It reads concrete reactions, not abstract self-descriptions.

tests.label: Vocational (short)
tests.description: The short Phase 1 version. It shows which kinds of activities attract you most.

tests.label: Short personality
tests.description: A first profile for energy, structure, curiosity, and how you work with people.

profilCompletCard.label: More precise. More detailed.
profilCompletCard.description: For when it matters: use the result to choose between real options.
profilCompletCard.footer: Free during the pilot. Under 16: available after parent or guardian consent.

home.startGuideLead: If you are not sure which test to pick, start with the one that gives the best signal for the time you have.
home.resultsPreviewTitle: What you get at the end
home.resultsPreviewLead: You get a top 3 list of matching careers + Romanian institutions that can take you there.

resultsPreviewItems.title: Top 3 matches
resultsPreviewItems.body: Career directions that fit your answers, not what would merely sound impressive.

resultsPreviewItems.title: Match + explanation
resultsPreviewItems.body: An orientation score and a clear summary of why that direction came up for you.

resultsPreviewItems.title: Real options
resultsPreviewItems.body: Degrees, jobs, paths, and roles you can explore in Romania.

resultsPreviewItems.title: Concrete steps
resultsPreviewItems.body: Your path toward what actually fits you.

home.storyQuote: Andra took the test, saw visual design was a real fit, followed the needed steps, and now studies at UNArte.
home.storyMeta: The test does not decide for you. It shortens the path to options worth exploring seriously.
home.helpLead: You answer simply. We translate the signal into concrete career options.
home.helpBody: You do not need to know what Big Five or Holland mean. Pick a test, answer honestly, then see which paths, universities, and roles are worth exploring.

helpItems.title: Real scenarios
helpItems.body: Reads concrete reactions: what you notice, what you choose, and where your attention goes naturally.

helpItems.title: Personality + IPIP
helpItems.body: Shows how you work with energy, structure, curiosity, and other people.

helpItems.title: Vocational
helpItems.body: Shows which kinds of activities attract you: building, researching, creating, helping, leading, or organizing.

home.algorithmBody: The algorithm looks for patterns between your answers and the signals found in real roles. More tests make the signal more precise.
home.placeholderLead: This route exists for deep links and campaigns. We will implement the questions after validating the landing page.
home.libraryLead: Results should be able to recommend university, trade school, self-taught, creator, founder, or a mixed path. That remains the product direction.

rezultate.noDataLead: Results appear after you complete at least Scenarii reale.
rezultate.institutionsTitle: {count} real programs that can get you here
rezultate.profileTitle: YOUR PROFILE — WHAT WE'VE UNDERSTOOD SO FAR
rezultate.profileSub: This is what the algorithm sees. It doesn't judge — it just listens.
rezultate.completedNote1: One more test → more precise matches (~50% accuracy). With all three → ~75%.
rezultate.completedNote2: Almost there. The last test surfaces motivational fit.
rezultate.completedNote3: Complete profile. Matches calibrated with all available signals.
rezultate.honestyBody: Honest answers = useful matches for you. If you pick "what would sound good for your mom", the algorithm will recommend your mom's career, not yours.
rezultate.othersTitle: And <mark>3 more vibes</mark> that work for you
rezultate.saveBody: All data stays on your device.
rezultate.paidTitle: More precise. More detailed. Free during the pilot.
rezultate.paidBody: 60-item scientifically validated Big Five + 60-item vocational test + full PDF report. Use the result to choose between real options: university, vocational school, first job.
rezultate.paidDisclaimer: This will become a paid package later. For now, we are testing it free during the pilot. Under 16: available after parent or guardian consent.

auth.authLead: We send a magic link by email. Tests stay local until you explicitly choose what to save.
auth.sentLead: Open the link sent to {email}. After sign-in we continue saving.
auth.ageLead: We only use this answer to apply the correct rules for minors' data.
auth.parentTitle: We need a parent or guardian email
auth.parentLead: You can keep using the free tests. Complete Profile (IPIP-NEO-60 + Full Vocational + report) becomes available after an adult confirms.
auth.parentSentLead: You can continue the free tests. Complete Profile becomes available after an adult confirms.
auth.magicLinkError: We could not send the magic link. Try again.
auth.profileError: We could not update your profile. Try again.
auth.parentError: We could not save the consent request.
auth.parentInvalidEmail: The parent or guardian email does not look valid.
auth.parentInvalidState: Consent can only be requested after choosing an under-16 age band.
auth.parentMissingSession: Your session expired. Sign in again.
auth.parentInvalidSession: Your session is no longer valid. Sign in again.
auth.parentRateLimited: You sent too many requests. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.callbackErrorTitle: The sign-in link did not work
auth.callbackErrorLead: Request a new link and try again.
auth.consentRequiredLead: If you are under 16, you can keep using the free tests (scenarios, short personality, short vocational). Complete Profile — IPIP-NEO-60 + Full Vocational + detailed report — is free during the pilot and becomes available after a parent or guardian confirms.

cariera.noSchoolsBody: We haven't verified programmes for this career yet. Come back soon.

profil.title: Your vibes
profil.leadReady: Your profile is built from quizzes and tests. Careers that fit you are below.
profil.leadEmpty: Saved careers. Retake the quiz whenever you want.
profil.phaseLeadEmpty: Start building — take tests, explore, save options.
profil.formingBody: Answer a quiz or a test to build your profile. Then we show careers that actually fit you.
profil.identityLead: Tests, saved careers, and your chosen path in one place.
profil.parentPendingMeta: Complete Profile is waiting for consent.
profil.exploreCardBody: See all careers and compare options at your own pace.
profil.savedPathBody: You picked one main path. You can change it anytime from Explore.
profil.savedEmptyBody: Retake the quiz and save the vibes that catch you.
profil.parentShareTitle: Show your profile to a parent
profil.parentShareLead: Send a summary with {career}, {count} saved alternatives, and your chosen path.
profil.parentShareText: I made my Ce Să Fiu profile. Main direction: {career}. Saved alternatives: {count}. See the profile: {url}
profil.emptyBody: We could not read local data. Retake the test and we will try again.

browse.title: Explore
browse.lead: All options — not just the ones that come up in the quiz.
browse.emptyBody: Change the filter or search for something else.
browse.pathsLead: University isn't the only option. All paths with real pros/cons.
browse.pathReplaceConfirm: You already have “{current}” in your profile. Replace it with “{next}”?
browse.uniFallbackNote: The official site is not in our database yet — Google search for {name}.

referrals.title: Want to see what your friends get?
referrals.lead: Send them the challenge and compare future-fit vibes.
referrals.signedOutLead: Sign in to get your challenge link and see how many friends join.
referrals.blockedLead: Your profile is waiting for parent consent. You can still take tests, but account-level invite tracking stays off.
referrals.shareText: I took the Ce Să Fiu test and got {archetype}. Try it too: {url}
referrals.profileSignedOut: Sign in to get your link and see how many friends joined.
referrals.profileBlocked: Account-level invite tracking becomes available after parent consent.

error.title: Something went wrong.
error.lead: We received the technical signal without test answers or parent data. You can try again.
